get.description: Returns the controller's active `[setpoints]` bundle (controller spec §4). The temperature setpoint returned is the configured day/night pair, not the currently-resolved value.

patch.description: Partial (merge) update of the global setpoints — the runtime path Phase 2 uses to push resolved crop-profile or optimizer setpoints (RFC-005), and the operator uses for ad-hoc edits. Only the fields present are changed. Out-of-range values, and cross-field invariants the schema cannot express (e.g. `humidity_low_pct` must be below `humidity_high_pct`), are rejected with 422 naming the violated bound.
